mapper.sql:
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.FRST_INQ_DTTM DESC) as rowNum , USER_FIND_PSWD_SN as userFindPswdSn , FIND_PSWD_TYPE_CD as findPswdTypeCd , SENDER_NM as senderNm , SENDER_EMAIL as senderEmail , TTL as TTL , SND_CTS as SND_CTS , RGTR_ID as rgtrId , FRST_INQ_DTTM as regDttm , MDFR_ID as mdfrId , MOD_DTTM as modDttm FROM TB_HOME_USER_FIND_PSWD A WHERE 1=1
AND A.FIND_PSWD_TYPE_CD = #{findPswdTypeCd}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : select 설 명 : 비밀번호 찾기 EMAIL/SMS 템플릿 정보 조회 */
